lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Commodity database — mineral prices and demand that set the credits-per-ton value of each hull’s cargo.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Miner
sources.what: Mining career mechanics (laser, core, sub-surface) the suitability ratings weigh.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Mining Laser
sources.what: Mining tool and limpet-controller requirements that decide effective cargo per hull.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Review of the Type-11 Prospector, weighing the dedicated mining hull directly against established laser-mining setups.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Hands-on test of the Type-11 Prospector, the game's first purpose-built mining ship, in the field.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Type-11 Prospector, Elite's first dedicated mining vessel, against general-purpose miners.
